stories.headline: Ukraine ceasefire back in focus as US security guarantees fade and casualties mount

stories.headline: Israeli strikes on Lebanon risk unravelling US-Iran ceasefire, EU warns
stories.summary: Lebanon has declared a period of national mourning after a wave of Israeli strikes killed at least 254 people on Wednesday. The EU insists that the country be covered by the US-Iran ceasefire deal.

stories.headline: Wheat Rises Amid Iran Ceasefire Worries and Looming US Crop Data
stories.summary: Wheat rebounded from a one-month low in Chicago as optimism over the ceasefire in the Middle East faded, with any re-escalation potentially threatening further supply chain disruptions and higher price for farm inputs.

stories.headline: Stock Rally Stalls, Oil Rebounds Ahead of US-Iran Talks, Ceasefire Doubts | Bloomberg Brief 4/9/2026
stories.summary: US equity futures fall and oil rises after optimism surrounding the US-Iran ceasefire fade. President Trump pledging to keep US troops in the Persian Gulf ahead of talks between the two sides, which will be led by Vice President JD Vance. Nadia Martin Wiggin of Svelland Capital discusses the moves in oil and Max Kettner of HSBC on how crucial CPI will be when assessing the impact of the war with Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: Equities Reaction to Ceasefire Seen as ‘Pretty Rational’ by HSBC’s Kettner
stories.summary: Max Kettner, chief multi-asset strategist at HSBC, examines the relationship between equities and oil in response to the US-Iran ceasefire and sees a reduction in oil prices to near $80 later this year as “good enough” to drive markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

stories.headline: OECD Urges Reeves to Overhaul UK Tax System to Boost Growth
stories.summary: The OECD urged UK Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves to overhaul the tax system to make it less complex and help turn around Britain’s tepid growth rates.

stories.headline: Nvidia Shares Near Level Where Technical Traders See a Breakout
stories.summary: After months of sluggish returns, Nvidia Corp.’s stock is rallying again and close to breaking out of its narrow trading range, which market technicians see as a bullish signal.

stories.headline: UAE Oil Boss Says Hormuz Still Shut With Iran Restricting Access
stories.summary: The Strait of Hormuz remains closed with Iran still restricting access and preventing energy flows to global markets, the head of the biggest oil producer in the United Arab Emirates said. Tehran says transits must be under its supervision.

stories.headline: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly

stories.headline: U.S. Fertility Rates Drop to Another Record Low

stories.headline: Ohio Man Is First to Be Federally Convicted for Deepfake Porn
stories.summary: James Strahler II, 37, of Columbus, Ohio, had at least 10 victims, according to the authorities. He pleaded guilty to cyberstalking and other charges covered by the Take It Down Act.
